title: TREAT: Tokenization for Retrieving Entity-Aware Targets
inventors: A. Mittal, L. Kumar, P. Malhotra, A. Singh, M. Varma
abstract: A tokenization framework designed for retrieving entity-aware targets, improving entity recognition and retrieval in large-scale systems.
citation: Mittal, A., Kumar, L., Malhotra, P., Singh, A., & Varma, M. (2025). TREAT: Tokenization for Retrieving Entity-Aware Targets. U.S. Patent Application (Pending).
